wordplay_note: A man in his shell — the small businessman surviving
card_description: Stuart McConchie (meaning "McConchie = son of the shell") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Dr. Bloodmoney*. TV salesman who adapts to post-apocalyptic bartering economy. Name note: A man in his shell — the small businessman surviving. The resilient small entrepreneur — PKD's admiration for the adaptable ordinary person. First appears in *Dr. Bloodmoney*.

reference.brief: TV salesman who adapts to post-apocalyptic bartering economy
reference.significance: The resilient small entrepreneur — PKD's admiration for the adaptable ordinary person
